faqs.question: Why are silverfish common in Bay Terrace homes?
faqs.answer: Bay Terrace's coastal location creates higher humidity levels that silverfish love. These pests are attracted to damp areas like basements, bathrooms, and crawl spaces common in the neighborhood's housing stock. Older homes in particular may have moisture issues that create perfect breeding conditions for silverfish populations.

faqs.question: What does your silverfish control service include?
faqs.answer: Our $350-$550 service includes a thorough inspection of your Bay Terrace property, identification of moisture sources and entry points, targeted treatment of infested areas, application of residual barriers, and humidity reduction recommendations. We also provide follow-up monitoring to ensure complete elimination and prevent future infestations.

faqs.question: How quickly can you eliminate a silverfish infestation?
faqs.answer: Most Bay Terrace homes see significant reduction in silverfish activity within 1-2 weeks of initial treatment. Complete elimination typically takes 3-4 weeks depending on the severity of the infestation. We schedule follow-up visits to monitor progress and reapply treatments as needed to ensure your home remains silverfish-free.

faqs.question: Are your silverfish treatments safe for my family and pets?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-approved products that are highly effective against silverfish but safe for humans and pets when applied by our licensed technicians. We can also provide pet-friendly and child-safe treatment options for Bay Terrace families with specific concerns. All products are applied strategically in areas where silverfish hide while minimizing exposure to living spaces.
